name: samstone908--smart-models
description: Intelligent multi-model router — automatically selects the best AI model based on task type (vision, image generation, video generation, audio, reasoning, code, general chat) via any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint. Supports 35+ models across 7 categories with @alias shortcuts. Use when: user sends an image for analysis, requests image/video/audio generation, needs deep reasoning or math proofs, wants to use a specific model, or prefixes message with @alias (e.g. @gpt52, @o3, @sora, @imagen).
